programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Mexico City Jumping - GCL R2 – Competition Team
programme.desc: Held at Campo Marte in Mexico City, featuring CSI5* show jumping with fences up to 1.60m. The competition features ranking classes, Grand Prix action and decisive Jump-Off rounds, where faults and time determine the winners.

programme.title: Everton vs Manchester City - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Everton have lost their last eight home league games against Manchester City, their longest run of consecutive defeats against an opponent in their history. Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 17 Premier League games against Everton, since a 4-0 loss in January 2017.

programme.title: Day 3 - Wimbledon Qualifiers 2026
programme.desc: The road to Wimbledon begins at Roehampton, where players battle through the Qualifying Competition for a place in the main draw of The Championships 2026. programme.desc: All 380 matches from the English Premier league are live and exclusive only on beIN. All matches are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. programme.desc: West Ham have lost 38 Premier League games against Arsenal – they’ve only lost more often against Liverpool, while the Gunners have only beaten Everton more. programme.title: Freiburg vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Rayo Vallecano - UEFA Conference League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Final
programme.desc: Paris SG and Arsenal will be facing each other for the eighth time in all competitions, with their head-to-head record perfectly balanced at two wins each and three draws. programme.desc: MotoGP heads to Thailand at the Chang International Circuit in Buriram, a track defined by long straights, heavy braking zones, and intense heat. The stop-start layout challenges tyre management and rider endurance, while strong acceleration out of slow corners is crucial. Local support and Honda’s home presence add extra intensity to this demandin

programme.title: Al-Ahli Saudi The Champions Of AFC CL Elite 2025/2026
programme.desc: Saudi club Al-Ahli FC secured their status as Asia’s top club by winning the 2025/2026 AFC Champions League Elite title, defeating Japan's Machida Zelvia 1-0 in the final on April 25, 2026, at King Abdullah Sports City Stadium in Jeddah. Al-Ahli FC became the first team to win back-to-back Asian titles since city rival Al Ittihad in 2005.

programme.title: Marketa Vondrousova (CZE) vs Ons Jabeur (TUN) - Ladies Singles Final - Mini Matches - Wimbledon 2023
programme.desc: Jabeur and Vondrousova have a 3-3 head-to-head record, with Vondrousova winning both meetings in 2023. Jabeur aims to become the first African Grand Slam singles champion, while Vondrousova is the first unseeded Wimbledon finalist in the Open Era and has previously been a Grand Slam finalist as an unseeded player.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Sporting CP - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg

Sporting CP haven’t won away to an English team since March 2005, drawing five and losing five of their last 10 trips; four of which have been in the UEFA Champions League.

programme.desc: A recap of the best of the action, plus a look forward to the next Match Day in Europe’s premium football competition, the UEFA Champions League. The 2025/26 UEFA Champions League will be the second to be played under the new 36-team league phase. All matches from the UEFA Champions League are live and exclusive only on beIN with a choice of Arabi

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Rayo Vallecano - UEFA Conference League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.title: FAR Rabat (MAR) vs Mamelodi Sundowns (RSA) - CAF Champions League 2025/26 - Final
programme.desc: The CAF Champions League, is an annual club football competition organized by the Confederation of African Football (CAF) and contested by top-division African clubs. It is the most prestigious club competition in African football and is live and exclusive only on beIN. The current champions are Pyramids Football Club from Egypt.

programme.title: Freiburg vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Al-Ahli Saudi The Champions Of AFC CL Elite 2025/2026
programme.desc: Saudi club Al-Ahli FC secured their status as Asia’s top club by winning the 2025/2026 AFC Champions League Elite title, defeating Japan's Machida Zelvia 1-0 in the final on April 25, 2026, at King Abdullah Sports City Stadium in Jeddah. Al-Ahli FC became the first team to win back-to-back Asian titles since city rival Al Ittihad in 2005.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Chelsea - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 10
programme.desc: Spurs have won just one of their last 13 Premier League games against Chelsea, losing the last four in a row since a 2-0 home win in February 2023. Chelsea have won five of their six Premier League games against Spurs at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, earning more victories at the ground than any other visiting side.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Aston Villa - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 10
programme.desc: Liverpool have won six of their last seven Premier League home games against Aston Villa, having been winless against them in four at Anfield before this. Aston Villa have won just one of their last 15 Premier League games against Liverpool, a 7-2 victory at Villa Park in October 2020.

programme.title: Manchester City vs AFC Bournemouth - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 10
programme.desc: Manchester City have won all eight of their Premier League home games against Bournemouth – in top-flight history, only Manchester United and City themselves have a better 100% home win rate against an opponent. Bournemouth have lost 15 of their 16 Premier League games against Manchester City, with the exception a 2-1 win at the Vitality Stadium

programme.desc: Each EPL Match week is condensed into a 52-minute highlights show. Every game, goal, penalty, red card and everything in between is squeezed into an action-packed hour to ensure no football fan misses a kick across the game season.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Manchester United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 11
programme.desc: Tottenham completed the Premier League double over Manchester United last season – they last won three consecutive league games against the Red Devils in 1959/1960. programme.title: Everton vs Fulham - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 11
programme.desc: After winning 22 consecutive home league games against Fulham between 1961 and 2018, Everton are now winless in their last four against the Cottagers. Fulham have lost just one of their last seven Premier League games against Everton, though it was in their last meeting at Craven Cottage in May.

programme.title: Sunderland vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 11
programme.desc: Sunderland are winless in their last 15 Premier League games against Arsenal, since a 1-0 home victory in November 2009. All three of Arsenal’s Premier League defeats against Sunderland have come away from home, and all by a 1-0 scoreline. Indeed, they’ve never conceded more than once in 16 visits to the Black Cats in the competition.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Wolverhampton Wanderers - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 11
programme.desc: After losing three consecutive Premier League games against Wolves between April 2023 and February 2024, Chelsea won both meetings last season by an aggregate score of 9-3. Wolves have won just one of their 11 Premier League away games against Chelsea, picking up a 4-2 victory in February 2024.

programme.desc: Each EPL Match week is condensed into a 52-minute highlights show. Every game, goal, penalty, red card and everything in between is squeezed into an action-packed hour to ensure no football fan misses a kick across the game season.

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Leeds United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 11
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest are unbeaten in their last 13 top-flight home games against Leeds since a 2-0 loss in November 1971 under Matt Gillies. Leeds won 2-1 against Nottingham Forest in their last Premier League meeting in April 2023, last winning consecutive top-flight games against them between 1971 and 1977.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Brighton & Hove Albion - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 11
programme.desc: Crystal Palace won both Premier League meetings with Brighton last season, as many times as they’d beaten them in their previous 12. Brighton are winless in six Premier League away games against Crystal Palace. They lost this exact fixture 2-1 last season, but haven’t lost at the Eagles in consecutive campaigns since 1985-86/1986-87.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 11
programme.desc: Man City lost both Premier League meetings with Liverpool last season, as many defeats as they’d suffered in their previous 12 against them. They last lost more consecutively against the Reds between March 2015 and December 2016. programme.title: Storm Hunter (AUS) / Elise Mertens (BEL) vs Su-Wei Hsieh (TPE) / Barbora Strycova - Ladies' Doubles
programme.desc: Hunter and Mertens have a record of 120-5 and they have won one title together, while Hsieh and Strycova have won eight titles and they are the oldest doubles pair to reach a Grand Slam final. Hsieh has won five Grand Slam doubles titles, and Strycova has made five semifinal runs across all Grand Slam tournaments.

programme.title: Wesley Koolhof (NED) / Neal Skupski (GBR) vs Marcel Granollers (ESP) / Horacio Zeballos (ARG) - Gent
programme.desc: Granollers/Zeballos lead the head-to-head 2-0, having won their previous two meetings at Roland Garros. The winners will claim their first Grand Slam men's doubles title. programme.title: Marketa Vondrousova (CZE) vs Ons Jabeur (TUN) - Ladies Singles Final - Mini Matches - Wimbledon 2023
programme.desc: Jabeur and Vondrousova have a 3-3 head-to-head record, with Vondrousova winning both meetings in 2023. Jabeur aims to become the first African Grand Slam singles champion, while Vondrousova is the first unseeded Wimbledon finalist in the Open Era and has previously been a Grand Slam finalist as an unseeded player.

programme.title: Carlos Alcaraz (ESP) vs Novak Djokovic (SRB) - Gentlemen’s Singles Final - Mini Matches - Wimbledon
programme.desc: They have played each other twice before, with one win each. Alcaraz is bidding to win his first Wimbledon title and become the third Spanish player to win the men's title. programme.title: England vs Ghana - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: England and Ghana are facing each other at the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Their only previous encounter came in a March 2011 friendly at Wembley – the game ended 1-1, with goals from Andy Carroll and Asamoah Gyan. England are unbeaten against African teams at the FIFA World Cup – in their eight matches, they have won five and drawn three. T

programme.title: Portugal vs Uzbekistan - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Portugal and Uzbekistan. Portugal are winless in their last two World Cup matches against teams from the AFC confederation – a 1-1 draw v Iran in 2018 and a 2-1 defeat v Korea Republic in 2022. Uzbekistan have won just one of their last 23 meetings with UEFA nations in all competitions, beating Kazakhst

programme.title: Czech Republic vs Mexico - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Mexico faced Czechoslovakia at the 1962 World Cup, winning 3-1 in their final group game. This will be their first FIFA World Cup meeting since the split of Czechoslovakia in the early 1990s. Czechia and Mexico’s last meeting came in a February 2000 friendly, in Hong Kong, with Czechia winning 2-1.

programme.title: Scotland vs Brazil - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Brazil and Scotland will face each other in the FIFA World Cup for the fifth time. Only Argentina v Netherlands has been played more times since the 1974 edition. programme.title: Norway vs Senegal - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage

Their three previous encounters all produced a Brazil victory, with the Seleção scoring 17 goals and conceding only one. programme.title: Türkiye vs Paraguay - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Türkiye and Paraguay are meeting at the World Cup for the first time. Their only previous encounter was a friendly in Chile over 30 years ago, in June 1995 – the game ended goalless. Paraguay have won only two of their last 14 World Cup matches against opposition from the UEFA confederation : 3-1 v Slovenia in 2002 and 2-0 against Slovakia in 2010.

programme.title: Belgium vs Iran - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Belgium and IR Iran. IR Iran have won only one of their 10 FIFA World Cup matches against European opposition, although that came in their most recent meeting, a 2-0 win over Wales in the 2022 group stage.

programme.title: Uruguay vs Cape Verde - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Uruguay and Cabo Verde. Cabo Verde’s only previous matches against teams from CONMEBOL came in June 2022 and in March this year.

programme.title: Norway vs Senegal - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be Norway and Senegal’s first World Cup meeting. Their only previous encounter came in a March 2006 friendly in Dakar – Senegal won 2-1. Norway have faced African opposition just once before at the FIFA World Cup, drawing 2-2 with Morocco in 1998 after twice being behind on the scoresheet.

programme.title: Netherlands vs Sweden - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Netherlands and Sweden will meet at the World Cup for the second time. Their first encounter, in the 1974 group stage, ended 0-0 and featured Johan Cruyff’s famous ‘Cruyff turn’ – one of 11 successful dribbles in the match, the joint-most by any player in a game at that tournament. Uruguay vs Spain - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Uruguay and Spain are facing each other at the FIFA World Cup for the third time – their two previous meetings both ended in draws. Uruguay have tasted victory in just one of their last nine FIFA World Cup matches played on Mexican soil : a 1-0 extra-time win over the USSR in the 1970 quarter-finals.

programme.title: Czech Republic vs Mexico - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Mexico faced Czechoslovakia at the 1962 World Cup, winning 3-1 in their final group game. This will be their first FIFA World Cup meeting since the split of Czechoslovakia in the early 1990s. Czechia and Mexico’s last meeting came in a February 2000 friendly, in Hong Kong, with Czechia winning 2-1.

programme.title: Scotland vs Brazil - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Brazil and Scotland will face each other in the FIFA World Cup for the fifth time. Only Argentina v Netherlands has been played more times since the 1974 edition. Scotland and Brazil’s first FIFA World Cup encounter was in 1974, ending in a goalless draw. Since then, Brazil have won their last three matches against Scotland at the tournament.

programme.desc: Paraguay and Australia are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Their five previous encounters were all friendlies played in Australia which produced two wins for the Socceroos and three draws. Current Australia head coach Tony Popovic played in three of those matches. Australia have never beaten a CONMEBOL nation at the FIFA World Cup

programme.title: Cape Verde vs Saudi Arabia - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Cabo Verde and Saudi Arabia. Saudi Arabia have lost only one of their five FIFA World Cup matches against African opposition – a 1-0 defeat against Cameroon in 2002. Cabo Verde will be their sixth different CAF opponent at the World Cup after Morocco, South Africa, Cameroon, Tunisia and Egypt.
